nasb.text: Linen turbans shall be on their heads and linen undergarments shall be on their loins; they shall not gird themselves with anything which makes them sweat.

esv.text: They shall have linen turbans on their heads, and linen undergarments around their waists. They shall not bind themselves with anything that causes sweat.

cnv.text: 他們頭上要戴細麻布的頭巾，腰間要穿細麻布的褲子；不可穿上使身體容易出汗的衣服。

ccb.text: 他们要戴细麻布头巾，穿细麻布裤子，不可穿使人容易出汗的衣服。
